findings.summary: World-readable key predicate perm>0o600 is too permissive — correct threshold is perm&0o077 (deny group+other bits), rejecting keys with mode 0644, 0655, etc. that the >0o600 check would incorrectly accept.
Management goroutine leak on keypair-load early return — goroutine launched before key load completes; on early error return the goroutine is orphaned with no shutdown signal.
Hardcoded /var/lib path with no test seam — prevents unit-testing of path-dependent logic without real filesystem side effects.
Doubled error prefix — error message wrapped with context string that duplicates the caller's wrapping, producing redundant text in logs.
AC-007 tested below runAccess boundary — test exercises the wrapper but not the access-decision logic it gates, leaving the guard untested at the relevant abstraction level.
.tmp file TOCTOU — temporary file creation pattern creates a window between temp-file existence check and use.

O_EXCL fixed-name .tmp wedges startup after crash, violating EC-011 — the F-7 fix introduced O_EXCL on a fixed-name temp file; if the process crashes while the file exists, the next startup fails to create it, leaving the daemon permanently wedged. Fix-induced by F-7.

F-7 dropped rulings §1.3 explicit Chmod → umask-dependent mode — the F-7 fix removed the explicit Chmod call that rulings §1.3 requires, leaving key-file permissions dependent on the process umask rather than the mandated explicit setting.
TestDaemonCleanShutdown performs real I/O to /var/lib — test writes to the real system path, making it environment-dependent and potentially destructive in CI.
Low-severity code quality issue identified in pass 2.
Nit-level style issue identified in pass 2.

Stale Red-Gate stub/MUST-FAIL doc-drift in access.go and test header — stub comment and MUST-FAIL annotation reference pre-implementation state that no longer matches the shipped code, creating misleading documentation for future readers.

CreateTemp orphan accumulation (bounded) — temporary files created by CreateTemp are not cleaned up on all error paths; accumulation is bounded by normal process lifecycle but leaves residue on repeated failures.

nitpicks_no_action.summary: Nit-level style issues identified in pass 3.
config_test.go doc-drift missed by P3 sweep — doc comment in config_test.go references pre-fix behavior not updated when access.go was fixed.
nitpicks_no_action.orchestrator_disposition: FIXED in P4 nits burst — minor doc comment updated.

nitpicks_no_action.summary: errors.Is nit — error comparison uses == where errors.Is is the idiomatic form.

passes.notes: RESET — streak reset to 0/3. Fresh reviewer probing spec-completeness surfaced 3 real MEDs missed by 4 prior passes (including 1 NITPICK_ONLY pass). Demonstrates the Pass-5-caught latent-gap pattern: adequate surface coverage without depth-of-spec verification.

findings.summary: Generation INFO log unasserted — the key-generation INFO log line is emitted but never asserted in tests, leaving the log contract untested and vulnerable to silent regression.

interface-definitions.md §Config Schema never updated — BC-2.09.004 PC-2 places an implementer obligation to update the interface definitions doc when Config fields change; the schema section still reflects pre-implementation structure, violating the behavioral contract's propagation requirement.

Tilde expansion promised by rulings §1.2 and code comment but not implemented — the sibling loadEd25519Key function implements tilde expansion; the admission provisioning path has both a comment and a rulings obligation promising the same expansion but the implementation is missing.
AC-005 umask-flake — test asserting key-file permissions is sensitive to the test process's umask, producing intermittent failures in environments with non-standard umask settings.

nitpicks_no_action.orchestrator_disposition: FIXED in M-series fix burst alongside M1-M3.

fix_commits.M2_interface_definitions_md: on factory-artifacts branch (NOT the code branch)

dispositioned_not_fixed.rationale: Cosmetic — ordering difference carries no behavioral consequence.
Accepted: compensated by the F-6 capture test which provides the substantive coverage at the correct abstraction level.
Test name is aspirational documentation; behavior under test is correct.
Variable shadowing is safe in this context — no mutation path to the outer binding.
Inv-5 sanctioned — invariant explicitly permits ignoring additional disc elements beyond index 0.

process_gap_findings_for_session_review.summary: Fix-induced regression pattern: F-7 (.tmp TOCTOU) → B-1 (O_EXCL fixed-name wedge). The fix for a NIT introduced a HIGH-severity liveness issue. Instance filed as vsdd-factory#661 (non-compiling middle commit).
Stub-panic shared-path: stub panic behaviour propagated into a shared code path, affecting unrelated tests. Instance filed as vsdd-factory#662.

Pass-5-caught latent-gap pattern: 4 clean-ish passes (including 1 NITPICK_ONLY) missed 3 real MEDs until a fresh reviewer explicitly probed spec-completeness (interface-definitions.md obligation, tilde expansion promise). Surface coverage is insufficient when the reviewer does not systematically check declared spec obligations (BC-2.09.004 PC-2 class).

out_of_scope_items_surfaced.summary: internal/admission/TestLookup_ConcurrentRegisterRace flake — pre-existing intermittent test failure in the concurrent register race test, unrelated to this story's changes.
discovery.go BC-version-pin doc drift — pre-existing version pin in discovery.go references a stale BC version. Maintenance-sweep candidate.

forward_guidance_for_S-BL.ADMISSION-SYNC.note: discovery.Config LocalSVTNID/LocalNodeAddr/Router fields are zero-valued in this story (Decision 5 scope: pubkey wiring only; §3.4 defers Advertise). The next leg MUST populate these fields before the advertisement path emits. Zero-valued LocalSVTNID/LocalNodeAddr will produce incorrect SVTN-isolation behaviour; zero-valued Router will panic or silently no-op on advertisement dispatch depending on nil-check posture.
